stemHtml: An aircraft is flying to Naples airport on an ILS approach. The visibility is poor and its position is less than 4 NM from the threshold of runway 24. The following ATC messages should be expected next...

options.a: FASTBIRD 166, CLEARED TO LAND RUNWAY 24, WIND 270 DEGREES 15 KNOTS.
options.b: FASTBIRD 166, REPORT FINAL RUNWAY 24, WIND 360 DEGREES 18 KNOTS.
options.c: FASTBIRD 166, ILS APPROACH TO RUNWAY 24, CLEARED TO LAND.
options.d: FASTBIRD 166, REPORT RUNWAY 24 IN SIGHT, WIND 270 DEGREES 15 KNOTS.
